test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Verify the health endpoint returns a successful status.

test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Create a new author with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without the required name field.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Retrieve details of an existing author.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve an author with a non-existent ID.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Delete an author who has no associated books.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_conflict
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete an author who has associated books.

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Create a new book with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that already exists.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Retrieve details of an existing, non-deleted book.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a book that has been soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Perform a soft delete on an existing book.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: restore_not_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to restore a book that is not deleted.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply a discount to a book published more than one year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply a discount to a book published less than a year ago.

test_cases.name: increase_book_stock
test_cases.description: Increase the stock quantity of a book.

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero
test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease stock below zero, resulting in insufficient stock.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book
test_cases.description: Add a review to an existing, non-deleted book.

test_cases.name: create_tag_success
test_cases.description: Create a new tag with a unique name.

test_cases.name: create_tag_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a tag with a name that already exists.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book
test_cases.description: Associate multiple tags with a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_sufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Create an order with items that have sufficient stock.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order where a book has insufficient stock.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_valid_transition
test_cases.description: Update an order status following a valid state transition (e.g., pending to confirmed).

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_transition
test_cases.description: Attempt an invalid status transition (e.g., pending to delivered).

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_confirmed_order
test_cases.description: Retrieve an invoice for an order in a confirmed, shipped, or delivered state.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_pending_order
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve an invoice for an order in a pending state.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_partial_success
test_cases.description: Bulk create books where some succeed and some fail (e.g., duplicate ISBN).

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_missing_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt bulk book creation without providing the required API key.
